# CUT_student_offer_letter

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

__Artificial Intelligence Institute Africa__

275 Hebert Chitepo Ave, Harare, Zimbabwe

\+263 78 643 4988

[admin@aiinstituteafrica\.com](mailto:admin@aiinstituteafrica.com) [www\.aiinstituteafrica\.com](http://www.aiinstituteafrica.com/)

__Date: 30 May 2026__

# Dear  Eng Kudakwashe Shindi

Ref: Invitation – Zimbabwe 2\.0: AI for National Transformation Summit 2026 & AI Tech Forum 2026

The Artificial Intelligence Institute Africa is pleased to invite you as an exhibitor at the AI Tech Forum Summit 2026 and AI For National Transformation – Zimbabwe 2\.0, scheduled to take place from 16 to 18 June 2026\.

The summits will bring together notable speakers, government ministers, public figures, industry leaders, innovators, investors, and technology professionals from across Africa and is a great platform to display your work to a notable crowd and discuss the future of Artificial Intelligence and digital transformation\.

As an exhibitor, you will have the opportunity to showcase innovative products, services, and solutions while engaging with key stakeholders, business leaders, and potential partners\.

The 2 packages

1 : Summit access,  dinner, hotel accommodation, and exhibition space at a fee of USD $300 per participant, per summit\.

2 : Summit access, dinner and exhibition space at a fee of USD $130 per participant, per summit\. 

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)__Dr Dennis Magaya__

__Chairman – AI Institute Africa__

*\+263 71 777 0666*

Board Members: Dr Dennis Magaya – Chairman \(Zimbabwe\), Dr Licky Erastus \- Deputy Chairman \(Namibia\) , Mr Cleopas Chiketa \- Deputy Chairman \(Zimbabwe\), Mr Robert Rusike – Treasurer \(Zimbabwe\), Dr Martin Manuhwa \(Zimbabwe\), Ms Perpetua Chimeura \(Zimbabwe\),

Mr Oabona Kgengwenyane \(Botswana\), Mr Emmanuel Mbewe \(Zambia\) , Ms Ruth Gorerokufa \(Zimbabwe\)
